business.name: Prime Roofing Co
business.hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Prime Roofing Co | Expert Carpenter in Dallas, TX | Free Estimates
seo.description: Prime Roofing Co offers premium carpentry services in Dallas, TX. From custom decks to structural repairs, our skilled carpenters deliver quality craftsmanship. Call (214) 513-3891 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Expert Craftsmanship
hero.subheadline: From custom decks to intricate trim work, Prime Roofing Co brings decades of experience to every project. We treat your home like our own.

featureSections.title: Built to Last, Designed for You
featureSections.body: Whether you need a new deck, custom shelving, or intricate crown molding, our team delivers precision and durability. We use only the finest materials and time-tested techniques.
featureSections.cardBody: Every project comes with a satisfaction guarantee. We stand behind our work.

featureSections.title: Your Roof, Our Priority
featureSections.body: As a full-service roofing company, we handle everything from minor repairs to complete replacements. Protect your home with a roof that's built to withstand Texas weather.
featureSections.cardBody: Regular maintenance can extend your roof's life by up to 50%.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We meet all Dallas regulations.

whyChooseUs.title: Free, No-Obligation Estimates
whyChooseUs.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Get a detailed quote before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We source only top-grade lumber and roofing materials for lasting results.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We treat your property with care, cleaning up thoroughly after every job.

testimonials.quote: Prime Roofing built our custom deck and it's stunning. The team was professional, on time, and left the yard spotless. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Michael R.

testimonials.quote: They repaired our roof after a storm and did an amazing job. Fair price and quick work. We'll call them for any future projects.
testimonials.author: Linda S.

testimonials.quote: From the estimate to the final walkthrough, everything was seamless. The craftsmanship on our new cabinets is top-notch.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate. Let's bring your vision to life.

servicesPage.intro: At Prime Roofing Co, we offer a full range of carpentry and roofing services tailored to Dallas homeowners. Our skilled craftsmen combine traditional techniques with modern innovation to deliver exceptional results.

services.title: Custom Decks & Pergolas
services.shortDescription: Design and build beautiful outdoor living spaces with custom decks and pergolas.
services.longDescription: Transform your backyard into an oasis with a custom deck or pergola from Prime Roofing Co. We work with you to design a space that fits your lifestyle, whether you want a cozy platform for grilling or a multi-level entertainment area. Using premium pressure-treated lumber or composite materials, we ensure your deck is built to last for decades.
benefits: Enhances home value and curb appeal
Customizable to any size or shape

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We meet on-site to discuss your vision, measure the area, and create a custom design plan.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from a variety of woods, composites, and finishes to match your style and budget.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our team builds your deck with precision, ensuring structural integrity and beautiful results.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a deck?
faqs.answer: Most deck projects take 1-2 weeks, depending on size and complexity.

faqs.question: Do you offer composite decking?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer Trex and other composite materials that require minimal maintenance.

services.title: Interior Trim & Molding
services.shortDescription: Add elegance to your home with custom crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting.
services.longDescription: Elevate the interior of your home with expertly installed trim and molding. Our carpenters specialize in crown molding, chair rails, wainscoting, and custom built-ins. We match existing styles or create new designs that complement your architecture. Every joint is seamless, every corner precise.
benefits: Custom designs to match any decor

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We review your space and recommend molding styles that enhance your home's aesthetic.

process.title: Material & Profile Selection
process.description: Choose from wood, MDF, or polyurethane in various profiles and sizes.

process.title: Precision Installation
process.description: Our team installs with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring clean lines and perfect joints.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles or blend new trim with old for a cohesive look.

faqs.question: How much does crown molding cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by material and room size; we provide a free estimate after measuring.

services.title: Cabinet Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Install or refinish kitchen and bathroom cabinets for a fresh, modern look.
services.longDescription: Upgrade your kitchen or bathroom with custom cabinet installation or refinishing. Prime Roofing Co offers full-service cabinet work, from building custom cabinetry to repairing damaged doors and drawers. We work with all styles, from traditional to contemporary, ensuring a perfect fit and finish.

process.title: Assessment & Planning
process.description: We evaluate your existing cabinets or space and discuss your goals.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: Choose from solid wood, plywood, or MDF with various finishes and hardware.

process.title: Installation or Refinishing
process.description: Our team installs new cabinets or refinishes existing ones with precision and care.

faqs.question: Can you reface my cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, refacing is a great option to update the look without replacing the entire cabinet box.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet installation take?
faqs.answer: Typical kitchen cabinet installation takes 3-5 days, depending on complexity.

services.title: Roof Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Protect your home with professional roof repair, maintenance, and full replacements.
services.longDescription: Your roof is your home's first defense against the elements. Prime Roofing Co provides comprehensive roofing services, from minor leak repairs to complete tear-offs and replacements. We use high-quality shingles and metal roofing materials that withstand Dallas weather. Our team follows strict safety protocols and ensures proper ventilation for long-lasting performance.

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: We perform a thorough inspection and provide a detailed estimate with no surprises.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from asphalt shingles, metal, or tile in a variety of colors and styles.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our crew installs your new roof efficiently, with cleanup and disposal included.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on roofing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both workmanship and manufacturer warranties on all roofing installations.

faqs.question: Can you repair a leaky roof?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We locate the source of the leak and make durable repairs to prevent future issues.

about.headline: Craftsmanship You Can Trust
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with exceptional carpentry and roofing services that combine quality materials, skilled workmanship, and outstanding customer care.
story: Prime Roofing Co was founded in 1990 by master carpenter John Prime, who believed that every home deserves attention to detail. Starting with a small crew and a commitment to excellence, John built a reputation for reliable, high-quality work. Over the decades, we've grown into a full-service carpentry and roofing company serving the Dallas area.

Today, our team continues John's legacy by treating every project as a reflection of our values: integrity, craftsmanship, and respect for your home. Whether we're building a custom deck or repairing a roof, we approach each job with the same dedication that has earned us the trust of hundreds of homeowners.

coreValues.title: Quality Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, using only the best materials and techniques.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We listen, communicate, and deliver.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and reliable service.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: We maintain a safe work environment for our team and your family.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? Call us or fill out the form for a free estimate.
